name: Jewel Trees
recipeInstructions:
1. Roll out dough and cut out shapes using an 8-inch Christmas tree cutter.
2. Place the cutouts carefully on foil-lined cookie sheets.
3. Using small cutters, cut additional shapes randomly at random spots on the trees.
4. Fill the cutouts with crushed hard candies.
5. Bake for 12-15 minutes until the candies melt.
6. Allow to cool completely on the foil.
